# S-6 fixture — malicious hook-input paths whose run_id capture must be refused.
#
# Exercises: plugins/preview-forge/hooks/auto-retro-trigger.py
#   SCORE_REPORT / FAILED_FLAG regexes.
#
# Regex contract:
#   _RUN_ID = r"r-[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_-]{0,63}"
#   → requires `r-` prefix + alphanumeric first char + up to 63 more
#     alphanumeric / underscore / hyphen chars.
#   → blocks traversal (., ..), path injection (/), shell metachars
#     (;, |, $, backtick, space, newline), unicode, and overlong ids.
#
# One payload per line. Lines before `---OK---` MUST fail to match
# (find_run_id returns None). Lines after `---OK---` MUST match.

runs/../score/report.json
runs/../../score/report.json
runs/./score/report.json
runs/.../failed.flag
runs/r-./score/report.json
runs/r-../score/report.json
runs/r-/score/report.json
runs/r-abc..def/score/report.json
runs/r-;rm/score/report.json
runs/r-$(whoami)/score/report.json
runs/r-001/score/report.json.bak
runs/r-001/../../root/score/report.json
runs/r-001/score/report.json.tmp
runs/r-001/failed.flag.bak
---OK---
runs/r-20260423-221530/score/report.json
runs/r-19700101-000000/failed.flag
runs/r-001/score/report.json
runs/r-42/failed.flag
runs/r-demo/score/report.json
runs/r-abc_def/failed.flag
runs/r-abc-def-123/score/report.json
